elements.description: A middle-aged couple, a man and a woman, standing side by side. They are dressed casually, with concerned expressions on their faces. The man has short gray hair and glasses, while the woman has shoulder-length brown hair and a worried look.
A close-up of a person's face showing stress, with furrowed brows, a tense jaw, and a hand rubbing their forehead. The background is blurred, emphasizing the expression of worry and anxiety.
A stack of bills and receipts piled on a table, with a calculator and a pen nearby. The bills are slightly crumpled, and the top receipt shows a high amount due. The scene conveys financial pressure.
